name: Suspicious USB / Removable Device Found
description: Employee found an unattended USB drive, SD card, or other removable device and wants security to handle it.
title: Report a Suspicious USB or Removable Device
intro:
Thanks for not plugging it in. Unknown USB drives can carry malware, even if they look harmless. Fill in what you know and we'll arrange a safe pickup.

**Please don't plug the device into any computer**, even just to see what's on it.
submit_message: Thanks. We've logged this and someone from security will reach out to coordinate pickup. Please keep the device somewhere safe and don't connect it to anything.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: We'll use this to coordinate pickup.

fields.label: What kind of device is it?
Where did you find it?
options: Plugged into a kiosk, printer, or shared PC
Mailed or left at my desk

fields.label: Tell us a bit more about where
fields.help: Building, floor, room number, or anything that helps us locate the area.
fields.placeholder: e.g. North parking lot, near the EV chargers by the side entrance.
fields.sample_value: North parking lot, near the EV chargers by the side entrance. Looked like it had been dropped recently, wasn't dirty.

fields.label: Was it plugged into anything?
fields.help: We need to know if any company device may have been exposed.
options: No, I left it as found
Yes, it was plugged into a shared kiosk or printer
Yes, it was plugged into my computer
Yes, plugged into someone else's computer
fields.sample_value: No, I left it as found

fields.label: Any labels, stickers, or markings on it?
fields.help: Branding, names, handwriting, logos. 'Nothing visible' is fine too.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Red stick, no logo, 'CONFIDENTIAL' written in marker.
fields.sample_value: Plain black stick with a handwritten 'Payroll Q4' in silver marker.

fields.label: Photo of the device (optional)
fields.help: A photo helps us identify it without you having to handle it further.

fields.label: Where is it now?
fields.help: Where should we come pick it up? Please keep it somewhere safe and unplugged.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Locked in my desk drawer, 3rd floor, desk 312.
fields.sample_value: Locked in my desk drawer, 3rd floor, desk 312.

alert_template.title: Unknown removable device found by {{reporter_email}} at {{where_found}}
